<!-- source-hash: ca08c47219b645015979458eadc3ccf5 -->
Custom exception thrown when a requested log entry cannot be found, extending the base `NotFoundException` with a specific `LOG_NOT_FOUND` error code.

## Key Components

| Element | Description |
|---|---|
| `LogNotFoundException` | Runtime exception for missing log resources |
| `ErrorCode.LOG_NOT_FOUND` | Standardized error code automatically applied on construction |
| `NotFoundException` | Base class providing HTTP 404-style semantics |

## Usage Example

```java
// Throw when a log entry lookup yields no result
Log log = logRepository.findById(logId)
    .orElseThrow(() -> new LogNotFoundException(
        "Log with ID " + logId + " was not found"
    ));
```
